Hero.Title: Modern holiday apartment in Lovran
Hero.Subtitle: Enjoy a private pool, BBQ terrace, space for seven, all just minutes from the beach.

About.Title: Your modern escape in Lovran
About.Description1: Laurus Nobilis is a modern, fully equipped holiday apartment in Lovran, ideal for families and groups. With two queen beds and a separate single bed, the apartment comfortably accommodates up to 7 guests (5 in beds + 2 on the sofa).
About.Description2: The interior is modern and comfortable, with a fully equipped kitchen, air conditioning in all rooms, fast WiFi, and a TV in every bedroom. Outside, the private pool, terrace, and BBQ area offer a relaxing space to enjoy the sun and spend time together.
About.Description3: The apartment is located in a peaceful area, just a few minutes' walk from the beach, shops, and restaurants.

Map.Title: Location
Map.Description: Located in Lovran, just a short walk from the beach and within easy reach of restaurants, shops, and the old town.

Pricing.Title: Pricing
Pricing.Description: Prices vary depending on the season

PrivacyPolicy.IntroParagraph3: to inquire about or book our holiday apartment located in Lovran, Croatia.
PrivacyPolicy.IntroParagraph4: We are committed to protecting your privacy and processing personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Croatian and EU data protection laws.

Section1.Section1_1Intro: When you use our website or make a reservation, we may collect the following personal data:

Payment-related information (processed securely by our payment provider)
Any message or special request you submit during booking
Section1.Section1_1Outro2: store full payment card details on our servers.

Section1_2List: Pages visited and time spent on the website

CancellationPolicy.Title: Cancellation Policy
CancellationPolicy.IntroParagraph: This Cancellation Policy applies to all reservations made for the holiday apartment

Section1.Title: 1. Cancellation by the Guest
Section1.Paragraph1: Guests may cancel their reservation by contacting us via email at
Section1.Paragraph2: Refunds are issued according to the following rules:
List: Cancellations made more than 14 days before the scheduled check-in date
Cancellations made within 14 days of the scheduled check-in date

Section2.Title: 2. Refund Processing
List: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used at checkout.
Processing times may vary depending on the payment provider.
Any applicable transaction fees charged by third-party payment processors are non-refundable.

Section3.Title: 3. No-Shows and Early Departure
List: Guests who do not arrive on the scheduled check-in date without prior notice
are not eligible for a refund.
Early departure after check-in does not entitle the guest to a refund for unused nights.

Section4.Title: 4. Changes to Reservations
Section4.Body: Requests to change booking dates or guest details are subject to availability and may result in a price adjustment. Changes made close to the check-in date may be treated as a cancellation under this policy.

Section5.Title: 5. Cancellation by the Host
Section5.Body1: In the unlikely event that we must cancel a reservation due to unforeseen circumstances, guests will receive a full refund

Section6.Title: 6. Policy Acceptance
Section6.Body: By completing a reservation, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Cancellation Policy.

Section7.Title: 7. Contact
Section7.Intro: For cancellation requests or questions regarding this policy, please contact us at:
